titleStmt.title: SII 38.200: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 200. (A.R. No. 200 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription commences with the meykīrtti, Pugaḻ-mādu viḷaṅga. It records the creation of an endowment for the merit of the king. For this purpose, a land of 37(3/4) vēli and one mā was set apart, at Pavanambākkattiḍal at Ariśūr in Paiyyūr-koṭṭam to feed fifty priests at Kulōttuṅga-śōḻamaḍam in the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr temple. Taxes such as antarāyam and pāṭṭam were exempted from the 49th year and progressively required to be paid at one-third, one-half, and full rate in the succeeding years. The king is said to have approved this arrangement on the request of Maḻapāḍi Pichchar, a piḍāra of the temple, when he (king) was seated on the bedstead of the eastern side near the stair case in the main ground of the mansion called Gaṅgaikoṇḍasōḻaṉ in the palace at Gaṅgaikoṇḍasōḻapuram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭicūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉai maṉṉavarari luṟṟaḻi tarat tikkaṉaittun tancakkara naṭātti virasiṁhāsanattu Ula
kuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāna cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevar kaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻapurattuk kovilinuḷḷāl kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻan tirumāḷikaiyil Ātipūmiyiṟ kiḻai copānattup paḷ
ḷik kaṭṭilile Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷinapaṭi namakku naṉṟāka jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu cālaiūṭṭak kaṭavatākac coṉṉa kalattil Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār koyilil kulottuṅkacoḻaṉmaṭa
ttil Uṇṇacconṉa nitta pūjakar per Aimpatinmarkku veṇṭum nellu Eḻunūṟṟaimpatiṉ kalattukkup paiyyūrkoṭṭattu Araicūr nilaippavaṉampākkattiṭal veṇṭum nilam Iṭṭu Eḻuttaṟivānallūreṉnuṉ tirunāmattāl veṟu pirikkavum Iṉnilattuk
ku nāṟpattonpatāvatu Antarāyam pāṭṭan tavira Itan Etirāmāṇṭu munṟu kūṟiṭṭoru kūṟum Itan Etirāmāṇṭu Irukūṟum Itaṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam nerāka Iṟukkavum peṟa veṇṭumenṟu Ikkoyiliṟ piṭārar tirumaḻapāṭippiccaraik
kāṭṭiṉai nāṭuṭaiyār namakkuc connamaiyil namakku naṉṟāka tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkoyilil kulottuṅkacoḻamaṭattu Uṇṇum nitta pūjakar per Aimpatiṉmarkku perāl nāḷ Oṉṟukku nelluk kuṟuṇiyāka Ūrkkālāluṭaiya nel
lu Āyirattaiññūṟṟuk kalattināṟ kālākki nellu Eḻunūṟṟaimpatin kalattukkum paiyyūrkkoṭṭattu Araicūr nilaippavanampākkattu Oru pū viḷainilattu Iṭum nilam Irupattu nālaraiye mukkāṇiyum puñcai nilattu Iṭum nilam patinmun
ṟe nālumā mukkāṇiyum Āka nilam muppateḻemukkāle Oru māvināl nellu Eḻunūṟṟaimpatinkalamum Ivvūriṟ curukki jivitamāy varukiṟapaṭiyum paḻampiyarun tavirntu Innila muppattoḻa mukkāle Oru māvināl nellu Eḻunūṟṟaimpatin kalamuṅ kulot
tuṅkacoḻanmaṭattukku Iṟuppatākki Eḻuttaṟivānallūrenṉun tirunāmattāl yāṇṭu nāṟpattonpatāvatu mutal maṭappuṟam Iṟaiyiliyāka veṟupiṟittuk kuṭuppatu Innilattukku Antarāyam pāṭṭaṅ koḷḷumiṭattu nāṟpattonpatāva
tu Antarāyampāṭṭan taviravum Itan Etirāmāṇṭu munṟu kūṟiṭṭoru kūṟum Itan Etirāmāṇṭu Iru kūṟum Itan Etirāmāṇṭu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam nerākavum Iṟuppatu maḻapāṭi piccar namakku naṉṟākat tirutte
vatu Ivai maturāntakappāvaināṭṭu muventaveḷān EḻuStops here.
Digital edition of SII 38.200 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
